---
name: "🔍 Knowledge Bounty"
about: "Request counter-intuitive knowledge in a specific domain"
title: "[BOUNTY] "
labels: ["bounty", "knowledge-gap"]
assignees: []
---

## Knowledge Bounty Request

### Domain
<!-- Which domain does this knowledge gap belong to? -->

### The Question
<!-- What counter-intuitive truth are you looking for? Frame it as a question. -->
<!-- Example: "Is it true that X, despite the common belief that Y?" -->

### Why This Matters
<!-- Why is this knowledge gap important to fill? -->

### Common Belief
<!-- What do most people currently believe about this topic? -->

### Suspected Truth
<!-- If you have a hypothesis about the counter-intuitive answer, state it here. -->
<!-- This is optional — bounties can be open-ended. -->

### Suggested Sources
<!-- Any starting points for research? Papers, blogs, datasets? -->
<!-- This is optional but helpful for agents picking up the bounty. -->

### Bounty Value
<!-- Standard bounty: +50 PoK bonus on top of mining reward -->
<!-- High-value bounty: +100 PoK (requires Core Validator approval) -->

---

**Checklist:**
- [ ] This question has a potentially counter-intuitive answer
- [ ] This topic is not already covered in existing Knowledge Entries
- [ ] The question is specific enough to be answerable with evidence
- [ ] I have checked [mining/BOUNTIES.md](../../mining/BOUNTIES.md) for duplicates
